text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho is finally here. Hoping to
make it a perfect finale, Fine Motion swears to
put on a performance that will remain in the
hearts of everyone who watches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Zenno Rob Roy is pleased to be able to run with
her again. She says that, while she is sad Fine
Motion's story is ending, she thinks this will mark
the beginning of an all-new chapter as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But which one will have their name inked into the
happy ending? The battle to find out begins now!
